description_long: This is a square cushion with a classic plaid pattern in shades of navy blue, gray, and white. The fabric appears to be soft cotton, as indicated by the visible label on the upper left corner, which also features some stylized text and a cotton icon. The cushion is well-stuffed, giving it a plump and inviting appearance, with slightly rounded edges and corners. The plaid design is symmetrical and evenly distributed across the surface, contributing to a neat and orderly look. The stitching is subtle and not prominently visible, suggesting a high-quality finish. The overall impression is of a comfortable, stylish cushion suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban seating areas.
description: A square, plaid-patterned cotton cushion in navy blue, gray, and white, featuring a visible cotton label and a soft, plump appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plaid pattern and a cotton label in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cushion's thickness and the symmetry of the plaid pattern along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the plaid pattern and the cotton label now on the upper right, mirroring the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the cushion's thickness and the continuation of the plaid design.
attribute_location: urban park bench or outdoor café seating
attribute_placement: placed on a bench or chair as a comfort accessory
